name: Teresa Brewer
abstract: Teresa Brewer (born Theresa Veronica Breuer; May 7, 1931 – October 17, 2007) was an American singer whose style incorporated pop, country, jazz, R&B, rock 'n roll, musicals, and novelty songs. She was one of the most prolific and popular female singers of the 1950s, recording around 600 songs.

concerts.label: Children's Asthma Research Institute and Hospital 3rd Annual Parade of Stars
